finding: Unsandboxed shell execution with no confirmation gate or allowlist
exploit_or_impact: Prompt injection in file/MCP/web content -> model emits shell call -> arbitrary code execution as the operator (credential theft
confirmed: Document trust model + add opt-in command-approval gate and an executed-command audit log

finding: No version control in the workspace
exploit_or_impact: No history/churn/ownership/rollback/review; cannot reconstruct or revert changes
recommendation: git init + commit + push to protected remote

exploit_or_impact: Strong test suite is not enforced on change; regressions can land silently
recommendation: Add CI running pytest + ruff + pip-audit on push/PR for py3.11-3.13

finding: All runtime dependencies are unpinned with no lockfile
exploit_or_impact: Non-reproducible installs; a breaking google-genai/mcp release breaks Forge with no code change
recommendation: Pin compatible-release ranges + commit a lockfile (uv/pip-tools)

finding: vertex.py is a god module (~7 responsibilities in 872 lines)
exploit_or_impact: Highest change-friction file; harder to review/modify safely
recommendation: Extract SDK translation + retry-hint helpers into a separate module

finding: README omits security/trust model and config docs
exploit_or_impact: Operators unaware Forge executes arbitrary commands; slower onboarding
recommendation: Add Security & trust + config reference sections

finding: Full test suite cannot run locally due to temp-dir ACL
exploit_or_impact: 34 integration tests error at tmp_path setup; integration coverage unverifiable locally
recommendation: Recreate temp dir or use pytest --basetemp; re-run to confirm green

finding: Content search reads every workspace file fully into memory per query
exploit_or_impact: Slow/memory-heavy searches on large or binary-heavy workspaces
recommendation: Stream files line-by-line; skip oversized files; short-circuit at result cap

finding: No cross-process lock on session writes
exploit_or_impact: Two processes resuming the same session id can clobber each other (last-writer-wins)
recommendation: Add an advisory per-session lock file or document the constraint

finding: Session transcripts persisted unencrypted may contain secrets the agent read
exploit_or_impact: A secret read during a turn is stored in cleartext in the session JSON
recommendation: Document it; offer --no-persist/redaction; set restrictive file perms

finding: Atomic-write and binary-detection logic duplicated across tools and SessionStore
exploit_or_impact: Minor drift risk if one copy changes
recommendation: Extract shared atomicwrite() and decode-or-binary helpers

finding: pytest-asyncio used in tests but not declared
exploit_or_impact: Undeclared dev dependency; fresh env may miss it
recommendation: Add to [dev] extras or remove the dependency
